description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages build and publish using the node:10-alpine Docker image. In the build stage define an npm-build job that runs npm install then npm run build, and saves the dist directory as an artifact expiring in 30 minutes. Also in the build stage define an npm-lint job that runs npm install then npm run lint. In the publish stage define an npm-publish job that runs only on tags, executes npm version --allow-same-version --no-git-tag-version ${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}, writes the NPM token to .npmrc with echo '//registry.npmjs.org/:_authToken=${NPM_TOKEN}'>.npmrc, and runs npm publish to publish the package.
